changeSet.author: hivearmor
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO hive_compliance_control_mapping (control_id, mapping_type, data_types, cel_condition, description, weight, evidence_retention_days) VALUES
-- ── PCI DSS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -- id=52 Windows 10.2 Account Logon Failure (52, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4625', 'Failed interactive logon (4625) captured as required by PCI DSS 10.2 audit trail requirements', 1.0, 90),
-- id=44 Windows 7.3 Account Logon Success (44, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4624', 'Successful logon event (4624) provides evidence that user authentication activity is being captured', 1.0, 90),
-- id=50 Windows 10.2 Cleaned Event Log (50, 'VIOLATION', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && (logx.winlog.event_id == 1102 || logx.winlog.event_id == 1100)', 'Audit log cleared (1102) or logging service stopped (1100) violates PCI DSS requirement to protect audit trails', 1.0, 365),
-- id=53 Windows 10.2 Special privileges assigned to new logon (53, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4672', 'Privileged logon (4672) confirms that administrative access is being audited per PCI DSS 10.2', 1.0, 90),
-- id=54 Windows 10.2 User Accounts Created (54, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4720', 'User account creation (4720) documents identity provisioning events required by PCI DSS 10.2', 1.0, 90),
-- id=55 Windows 10.2 Additions to Security Groups (55, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && (logx.winlog.event_id == 4728 || logx.winlog.event_id == 4732 || logx.winlog.event_id == 4756)', 'Security group membership change confirms group access control changes are being audited', 1.0, 90),
-- id=56 Windows 10.2 Access to critical files or specific directories (56, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && (logx.winlog.event_id == 4663 || logx.winlog.event_id == 4656)', 'Object access audit event (4663/4656) provides evidence that access to cardholder data objects is logged', 1.0, 90),
-- id=57 Windows 10.2 Protected Object Permission Change (57, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4670', 'Permission change on a protected object (4670) documents access control modifications for audit', 1.0, 90),
-- id=48 Windows 8.3 Account Locks (48, 'VIOLATION', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4740', 'Account lockout event (4740) may indicate brute-force attack in violation of acceptable login attempt thresholds', 1.0, 90),
-- id=46 Windows 7.3 Account Authentication Using NTLM (46, 'INDICATOR', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4776 && logx.winlog.event_data.Status != "0x0"', 'NTLM authentication failure (4776 with non-zero status) is an indicator of credential-stuffing or lateral movement', 0.8, 90),
-- id=58 Windows 10.2 Account Authentication Using NTLM (58, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4776 && logx.winlog.event_data.Status == "0x0"', 'Successful NTLM authentication (4776) captured — evidence that authentication mechanism is being logged', 1.0, 90),
-- id=47 Windows 7.3 Kerberos ticket requests (47, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && (logx.winlog.event_id == 4768 || logx.winlog.event_id == 4769)', 'Kerberos TGT (4768) and service ticket (4769) requests confirm Kerberos authentication logging is active', 1.0, 90),
-- id=59 Windows 10.2 User Accounts Enabled (59, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4722', 'Account enabled event (4722) documents user activation as part of access provisioning audit trail', 1.0, 90),
-- id=60 Windows A1 User Account Logoff (60, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && (logx.winlog.event_id == 4634 || logx.winlog.event_id == 4647)', 'Logoff events (4634/4647) confirm session termination is being captured for complete session audit trail', 0.8, 90),
-- id=66 Windows A1 Logins with explicit credentials (66, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4648', 'Explicit credential logon (4648) documents use of RunAs or pass-through authentication for cardholder system access', 1.0, 90),
-- id=67 Windows A1 User Accounts Created (67, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4720', 'User account creation (4720) in the A1 compliance section documents identity lifecycle management', 1.0, 90),
-- id=49 Windows 10.2 Event Logging Service Shut Down (49, 'VIOLATION', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 1100', 'Event logging service shutdown (1100) violates PCI DSS requirement to maintain continuous audit logging', 1.0, 365),
-- id=51 Windows 10.2 Policy changes (51, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4719', 'Audit policy change (4719) captures modifications to the audit configuration itself — required for tamper evidence', 1.0, 90),
-- id=6 Windows 7.2 Additions to Security Groups (6, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && (logx.winlog.event_id == 4728 || logx.winlog.event_id == 4732)', 'Security group membership addition (7.2 scope) confirms privileged group changes are being logged', 1.0, 90),
-- id=38 Windows 7.2 Member Addition to a Security Local Group (38, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4732', 'Local group member addition (4732) confirms local administrator group changes are captured', 1.0, 90),
-- ── HIPAA ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -- id=17 Windows Account Logon Failure (17, 'VIOLATION', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4625', 'Failed logon on a system that may hold ePHI is a potential unauthorized access attempt under HIPAA 164.312(d)', 1.0, 365),
-- id=16 Windows Account Logon Success (16, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4624', 'Successful logon to a system holding ePHI is captured — satisfies HIPAA 164.312(a)(2)(i) unique user identification', 1.0, 365),
-- id=15 Windows Access to critical files or specific directories (15, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && (logx.winlog.event_id == 4663 || logx.winlog.event_id == 4656)', 'Object access audit event on PHI-related file or directory satisfies HIPAA 164.312(b) audit controls', 1.0, 365),
-- id=3 Windows Password Reset Attempts (3, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && (logx.winlog.event_id == 4723 || logx.winlog.event_id == 4724)', 'Password change (4723) or reset (4724) confirms credential management events are captured under HIPAA security rule', 1.0, 365),
-- id=4 Windows Policy changes (4, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4719', 'Audit policy change on a HIPAA-covered system must be logged as part of the security management process', 1.0, 365),
-- id=5 Windows Credential Access (5, 'INDICATOR', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4648', 'Explicit credential use (4648) may indicate credential sharing or delegation on systems processing ePHI', 0.9, 365),
-- id=12 Windows Special privileges assigned to new logon (12, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4672', 'Administrative session (4672) on a HIPAA-covered system — confirms privileged access is being audited', 1.0, 365),
-- id=13 Windows Event Log Service (13, 'VIOLATION', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && (logx.winlog.event_id == 1100 || logx.winlog.event_id == 1102)', 'Event logging service stopped or log cleared on a system holding ePHI constitutes a HIPAA audit control failure', 1.0, 365),
-- id=20 Windows User Accounts Created (20, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4720', 'New user account on a HIPAA system must be documented as part of workforce clearance and access authorization', 1.0, 365),
-- id=2 Windows User Account Attributes Changes (2, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4738', 'User account attribute change (4738) documents modifications to access rights on ePHI-holding systems', 1.0, 365),
-- id=7 Windows Access to shared resource (7, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 5140', 'Network share access (5140) on a HIPAA system documents remote access to shared resources containing ePHI', 1.0, 365),
-- id=11 Windows Network Access to shared resource (11, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 5140', 'Network share access to a resource on a HIPAA-covered system logged for access control review', 0.8, 365),
-- ── CMMC ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -- id=103 Level 1 (AC.1.001) Account Logon Failure (103, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4625', 'Failed logon captured per CMMC AC.1.001 — basic access control requires authentication attempt logging', 1.0, 90),
-- id=104 Level 2 (AU.2.043) Account Logon Success (104, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4624', 'Successful logon captured per CMMC AU.2.043 audit control — user sessions on CUI systems must be logged', 1.0, 90),
-- id=105 Level 2 (AC.2.007) User Accounts Created (105, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4720', 'Account creation (4720) logged per CMMC AC.2.007 — manage accounts associated with CUI access', 1.0, 90),
-- id=108 Level 3 (AC.3.014) Attempt to Access a Protected Object (108, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && (logx.winlog.event_id == 4663 || logx.winlog.event_id == 4656)', 'Object access event (4663/4656) satisfies CMMC AC.3.014 — employ the principle of least privilege', 1.0, 90),
-- id=109 Level 2 (AC.2.007) Protected Object Permission Change (109, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4670', 'Permission change (4670) on a protected object captured per CMMC AC.2.007 account management controls', 1.0, 90),
-- id=110 Level 3 (AC.3.014) Access to shared resource (110, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 5140', 'Network share access (5140) logged for CMMC AC.3.014 — control CUI flow enforcement on shared resources', 1.0, 90),
-- id=111 Level 5 (AC.5.025) Account Locks (111, 'VIOLATION', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4740', 'Account lockout (4740) is a violation indicator per CMMC AC.5.025 — employ dual authorization for critical actions', 1.0, 90),
-- id=112 Level 3 (AC.3.014) Access to critical files or specific directories (112, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4663', 'File system access audit event (4663) on CUI-containing directory satisfies CMMC AC.3.014', 1.0, 90),
-- id=113 Level 2 (AC.2.007) Special privileges assigned to new logon (113, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4672', 'Privileged session token (4672) logged per CMMC AC.2.007 — manage accounts with elevated access to CUI systems', 1.0, 90),
-- id=115 Level 1 (AU.1.001) Policy changes (115, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4719', 'Audit policy change (4719) captured per CMMC AU.1.001 — create and retain system audit logs', 1.0, 90),
-- id=116 Level 1 (AU.1.001) Logins with explicit credentials (116, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4648', 'Explicit credential use (4648) logged per CMMC AU.1.001 — audit records for explicit authentication events', 1.0, 90),
-- id=127 Level 2 (SI.2.212) Cleaned Event Log (127, 'VIOLATION', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 1102', 'Audit log cleared (1102) violates CMMC SI.2.212 — identify unauthorized changes to system audit logs', 1.0, 90),
-- id=163 Level 4 (AU.4.053) PowerShell Remote Session Creation (163, 'INDICATOR', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && logx.winlog.event_id == 4688 && logx.winlog.event_data.NewProcessName matches ".*powershell.*" && logx.winlog.event_data.CommandLine matches ".*(Enter-PSSession|Invoke-Command|New-PSSession|-ComputerName).*"', 'PowerShell remoting command is a lateral movement indicator — review per CMMC AU.4.053 extensive audit logging', 0.9, 180),
-- id=183 Level 2 (AC.2.007) Additions to Security Groups (183, 'EVIDENCE', 'WINDOWS_AGENT', 'logx.dataType == "WINDOWS_AGENT" && (logx.winlog.event_id == 4728 || logx.winlog.event_id == 4732 || logx.winlog.event_id == 4756)', 'Security group addition (4728/4732/4756) logged per CMMC AC.2.007 — manage accounts associated with CUI access', 1.0, 90);
